_comment: OneLake shortcut topology for Contoso Global Retail & Supply Chain

weather_data_feed.description: External weather data feed (daily forecasts, historical temperatures) stored as Parquet files in a partner ADLS Gen2 storage account. Used for demand forecasting models.
weather_data_feed.connection_notes: Requires a Fabric cloud connection to the partner storage account with Storage Blob Data Reader access.

gold_to_warehouse.description: Links the gold Lakehouse curated tables (dimensions and facts) into the data-warehouse workspace so the Synapse SQL endpoint and warehouse can query gold-layer Delta tables without data duplication.
gold_to_warehouse.target_lakehouse: contoso_warehouse (Lakehouse shortcut mounted in warehouse workspace)

amazon_s3._comment: Commented out in Terraform — enable when partner data sharing agreement is finalized.

partner_product_catalog.description: Third-party marketplace product catalog from a retail partner, stored in an S3 bucket. Contains competitive pricing, product attributes, and category mappings.

topology_notes.data_flow: External ADLS Gen2 (weather) → bronze Lakehouse via shortcut → notebooks transform to silver/gold → gold Lakehouse tables shortcutted into data-warehouse workspace for analytics
topology_notes.no_data_copy: All shortcuts are zero-copy virtual links. Data remains in its source location and is read on-demand.
topology_notes.security: Access is controlled by the Fabric connection (ADLS Gen2/S3) or OneLake workspace permissions (cross-workspace).
